expected_effect: Hold the stronger directional burst protection while releasing stale divergence more cleanly in quiet regimes, lifting raw screen mean edge above the prior retained seed.
rationale: The previous retained lane improved further after three narrow refinements. The best raw source combined a gentle post-recenter divergence-memory release with a slightly more directional 650/850 above-threshold burst split on top of the lighter shared-flow tax line.
title: Quiet release plus more directional burst split
